Many of these properties are structured under separate\r\n                  LLC entities to support responsible asset management, liability protection, and long-term\r\n                  portfolio growth.\r\n                &lt;/p&gt;\r\n                &lt;div className=\"text-center mt-4\"&gt;\r\n                  &lt;Image\r\n                    src=\"/assets/img/capital.jpg\"\r\n                    alt=\"Capital allocation illustration\"\r\n                    width={600}\r\n                    height={400}\r\n                    className=\"img-fluid\"\r\n                  /&gt;\r\n                &lt;/div&gt;\r\n              &lt;/div&gt;\r\n\r\n              &lt;div className={&#96;tab-pane fade ${activeTab === 'v-pills-settings' ? ### Answer

Yes — I’ve added headings to each tab pane that match the tab you click:

- **Operating Platform (`v-pills-home`)**: Inside the pane, above the paragraph, there is now an `<h3 className="services-tab-title">Operating Platform</h3>`.
- **Development & Commercial Strategy (`v-pills-profile`)**: The pane now starts with `<h3 className="services-tab-title">Development & Commercial Strategy</h3>` above its paragraph and Instagram embed.
- **Capital Allocation (`v-pills-messages`)**: The pane now wraps content in a `container` and starts with `<h3 className="services-tab-title">Capital Allocation</h3>`, followed by the paragraph, then the `capital.jpg` image below.
- **Governance and Board Leadership (`v-pills-settings`)**: Similarly, that pane now begins with `<h3 className="services-tab-title">Governance and Board Leadership</h3>`, followed by the paragraph and then the `governance.jpg` image underneath.

So whichever tab is active, its corresponding heading appears at the top of that tab’s content.

    "content": "/* Hero Section Styles */\r\n\r\n.hero {\r\n  width: 100%;\r\n  position: relative;\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  align-items: center;\r\n  background: linear-gradient(45deg, var(--background-color) 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface-color), transparent 10%) 100%), url(\"/assets/img/hero-bg.jpg\") center center no-repeat;\r\n  background-size: cover;\r\n  min-height: unset;\r\n  padding-top: 100px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero h1 {\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  font-size: 48px;\r\n  font-weight: 700;\r\n  line-height: 56px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero h2 {\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  font-size: 36px;\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n  line-height: 44px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero p {\r\n  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--default-color), transparent 30%);\r\n  margin: 5px 0 30px 0;\r\n  font-size: 20px;\r\n  font-weight: 400;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-get-started {\r\n  color: var(--contrast-color);\r\n  font-family: var(--heading-font);\r\n  font-weight: 500;\r\n  font-size: 16px;\r\n  letter-spacing: 1px;\r\n  display: inline-block;\r\n  padding: 10px 36px;\r\n  border-radius: 4px;\r\n  transition: 0.5s;\r\n  border: 2px solid var(--contrast-color);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-get-started:hover {\r\n  color: var(--accent-color);\r\n  background: var(--contrast-color);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-watch-video {\r\n  font-size: 16px;\r\n  transition: 0.5s;\r\n  margin-left: 25px;\r\n  color: var(--default-color);\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-watch-video i {\r\n  color: var(--accent-color);\r\n  font-size: 32px;\r\n  transition: 0.3s;\r\n  line-height: 0;\r\n  margin-right: 8px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-watch-video:hover {\r\n  color: var(--accent-color);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-watch-video:hover i {\r\n  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-color), transparent 15%);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-board-bio {\r\n  display: inline-block;\r\n  padding: 10px 30px;\r\n  border-radius: 4px;\r\n  font-weight: 600;\r\n  font-size: 16px;\r\n  background-color: #E0D40C;\r\n  border: 2px solid #E0D40C;\r\n  color: #000;\r\n  text-decoration: none;\r\n  transition: 0.3s ease;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .btn-board-bio:hover {\r\n  background-color: transparent;\r\n  color: #E0D40C;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero .animated {\r\n  animation: up-down 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate-reverse both;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.hero-img img {\r\n  border-radius: 50%;\r\n  width: 84%;\r\n}\r\n\r\n@media (max-width: 640px) {\r\n  .hero h1 {\r\n    font-size: 28px;\r\n    line-height: 36px;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  .hero h2 {\r\n    font-size: 24px;\r\n    line-height: 32px;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  .hero p {\r\n    font-size: 18px;\r\n    line-height: 24px;\r\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  .hero .btn-get-started,\r\n  .hero .btn-watch-video {\r\n    font-size: 13px;\r\n ---

### Update

- **Button color change**: I created a dedicated hero button class and applied your requested color.

In `HeroSection.tsx`, the link now uses the new class:

```tsx
<a
  href="/assets/docs/Courtney_Johnson_Board_Bio.docx"
  className="btn btn-board-bio"
  download
>
  Download my board bio
</a>
```

In `HeroSection.css`, I added:

```css
.hero .btn-board-bio {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 10px 30px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 16px;
  background-color: #E0D40C;
  border: 2px solid #E0D40C;
  color: #000;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: 0.3s ease;
}

.hero .btn-board-bio:hover {
  background-color: transparent;
  color: #E0D40C;
}
```

So the **“Download my board bio”** button in the hero now appears in **#E0D40C** and inverts on hover.
